title: Grassy Crisp Croatian Shrimp Pilaf
description: A flavorful and aromatic Croatian dish featuring shrimp, praline and herbs, perfect for a date night, with a buddhist-temple-friendly and al-dente finish. This recipe combines the freshness of grassy notes with the crunch of praline for a unique taste experience.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the shrimp and cook until pink and just done, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Remove the shrimp from the skillet and set aside.
Add the chopped praline to the skillet and cook until lightly toasted, about 2 minutes.
Add the basmati rice to the skillet and cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add the lemon juice, chopped parsley, dried thyme, salt, and pepper to the skillet and stir to combine.
Return the shrimp to the skillet and stir to combine with the rice mixture.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until the shrimp are coated in the rice mixture and heated through.
Stir in the chopped green onions and serve hot.
